title: Susan Mara
compiled_truth: Susan Mara is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1998-09-01 to 2002-01-30), Susan Mara sent 658 and received 4363 emails, totalling 5021 interactions. Top correspondents: [Jeff Dasovich](people/jeff-dasovich) (574), [James Steffes](people/james-steffes) (280), [Richard Shapiro](people/richard-shapiro) (271), [Paul Kaufman](people/paul-kaufman) (257), [Alan Comnes](people/alan-comnes) (239).
